texto: He must have lit up the sky that day on the mountain, what we call the transfiguration.Jesus on the mountaintop unveiled a foretaste of heaven and glory. Light filled him so that the witnesses remarked on a hue of white that was whiter than any shade possible.It was a sci-fi transportation to another dimension and while Peter and John were still reeling, Moses and Elijah showed up. It broke the barrier between heaven and earth for Jesus was the one who could belong to both at the same time. A citizen of heaven, a citizen of earth.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Sara Lowe sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “He must have lit up the sky that day on the mountain, what we call the transfiguration.Jesus on t…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a motivacao, christian, inspiracional, útil em momentos de inspiracao e inspiracional.
